statement.p:
Identify which of the following are rational functions and which are not.
f defined by f(x)=\frac{25x^2+3}{25x^2+3}
?
is
is not a rational function.
Q defined by Q(x)=\frac{5x^2+3\sqrt{x}}{2x}
?
is
is not a rational function.
g defined by g(t)=\frac{t\sqrt{5} -t^3}{2t+1}
?
is
is not a rational function.
P defined by P(x)=\frac{5x+3}{\abs{2x+1}}
?
is
is not a rational function.
h defined by h(x)=\frac{3^x+1}{x^2+1}
?
is
is not a rational function.

li.p: f defined by f(x)=\frac{25x^2+3}{25x^2+3} is a rational function as its formula is a polynomial divided by another polynomial.
Q defined by Q(x)=\frac{5x^2+3\sqrt{x}}{2x} is not a rational function because the numerator contains \sqrt{x} and is therefore not a polynomial.
g defined by g(t)=\frac{t\sqrt{5} -t^3}{2t+1} is a rational function as its formula is a polynomial divided by another polynomial.
P defined by P(x)=\frac{5x+3}{\abs{2x+1}} is not a rational function because the denominator contains the absolute value of an expression with variables in it.
h defined by h(x)=\frac{3^x+1}{x^2+1} is not a rational function because the numerator contains 3^x\text{,} which has a variable in the exponent.

webwork-reps.pg:
############################################# ### Generated from PreTeXt source ### ### https://pretextbook.org ### ############################################# ## DBsubject() ## DBchapter() ## DBsection() ## Level() ## KEYWORDS() ## TitleText1() ## EditionText1() ## AuthorText1() ## Section1(not reported) ## Problem1(3.1.7) ## Author() ## Institution() ## Language(en-US)
DOCUMENT();
############################################################ # Load Macros ############################################################ loadMacros( "PGstandard.pl", "PGML.pl", "AnswerFormatHelp.pl", "parserPopUp.pl", "PGcourse.pl", ); COMMENT('Authored in PreTeXt');
############################################################ # Header ############################################################ TEXT(beginproblem());
############################################################ # PG Setup Code ############################################################ Context('Numeric'); $yes=PopUp(['?','is', 'is not'],1); $no=PopUp(['?','is', 'is not'],2);
############################################################ # Body ############################################################
BEGIN_PGML Identify which of the following are rational functions and which are not. a. [`f`] defined by [`f(x)=\frac{25x^2+3}{25x^2+3}`] [_]{$yes}{5} a rational function.
a. [`Q`] defined by [`Q(x)=\frac{5x^2+3\sqrt{x}}{2x}`] [_]{$no}{5} a rational function.
a. [`g`] defined by [`g(t)=\frac{t\sqrt{5} -t^3}{2t+1}`] [_]{$yes}{5} a rational function.
a. [`P`] defined by [`\definecolor{sapphire}{RGB}{59,90,125}\newcommand{\abs}[1]{\left\lvert#1\right\rvert}P(x)=\frac{5x+3}{\abs{2x+1}}`] [_]{$no}{5} a rational function.
a. [`h`] defined by [`h(x)=\frac{3^x+1}{x^2+1}`] [_]{$no}{5} a rational function.
END_PGML
############################################################ # Solution ############################################################
BEGIN_PGML_SOLUTION a. [`f`] defined by [`f(x)=\frac{25x^2+3}{25x^2+3}`] is a rational function as its formula is a polynomial divided by another polynomial.
a. [`Q`] defined by [`Q(x)=\frac{5x^2+3\sqrt{x}}{2x}`] is not a rational function because the numerator contains [`\sqrt{x}`] and is therefore not a polynomial.
a. [`g`] defined by [`g(t)=\frac{t\sqrt{5} -t^3}{2t+1}`] is a rational function as its formula is a polynomial divided by another polynomial.
a. [`P`] defined by [`\definecolor{sapphire}{RGB}{59,90,125}\newcommand{\abs}[1]{\left\lvert#1\right\rvert}P(x)=\frac{5x+3}{\abs{2x+1}}`] is not a rational function because the denominator contains the absolute value of an expression with variables in it.
a. [`h`] defined by [`h(x)=\frac{3^x+1}{x^2+1}`] is not a rational function because the numerator contains [`3^x\text{,}`] which has a variable in the exponent.
END_PGML_SOLUTION
############################################################ # End Problem ############################################################
ENDDOCUMENT();
